US_EQUITY.description: US Equities — S&P500/NASDAQ stocks, ETFs (SPY, QQQ, AAPL, NVDA, TSLA)

strategy.name: EMA Trend Stack + MACD Swing
strategy.edge: Institutional EMA levels (9/21/50/200) create self-fulfilling support/resistance. MACD cross in trend direction filters noise. Win rate ~58–62% in trending markets.

indicators.EMA_50: Trend qualifier — price must be above for longs
indicators.EMA_200: Bull/bear regime filter — no longs below
indicators.RSI_14: Regime filter — longs only RSI 52–72, shorts 28–48
indicators.MACD_12_26_9: Momentum confirmation — hist must match direction
indicators.Volume_SMA20: Entry filter — volume > 20-period SMA on signal bar

long: MACD histogram turning positive (crossover or already positive)
Enter on next bar open (daily) or at close of signal bar (4H)

exit_rules.trail_exit: Close position if EMA 9 crosses back through EMA 21 in adverse direction
exit_rules.time_exit: Exit any open swing trade after 10 bars if not in profit

risk_rules: Max 2% portfolio risk per trade
Max 3 open positions simultaneously
No trading in first 15 min or last 15 min of session
Earnings blackout: no new entries within 3 days of earnings
Avoid low-liquidity stocks (ADV < $5M)

TADAWUL.description: Saudi Stock Exchange — TASI index and liquid Saudi stocks

strategy.name: Fibonacci EMA Trend + Volume Surge
strategy.edge: Tadawul has strong institutional participation (sovereign wealth, retail). Fibonacci EMA periods (13/34/89) align with dominant swing durations. Volume surges on open confirm institutional intent. Win rate ~60–65% on daily with trend filter.

indicators.Volume_SMA20: Volume surge filter — require 1.2× SMA on signal

special: Sunday open gap: if price gaps up > 1.5% above EMA 34 with volume surge → long
Avoid Thursday close entries — weekend gap risk

long: Prefer Sunday entries — momentum from global weekend news

exit_rules.time_exit: Exit by Thursday market close — avoid weekend gap

risk_rules: Max 2% portfolio risk per trade
No entries on Wednesday or Thursday afternoon (weekend gap risk)
TASI index as regime filter — only long individual stocks when TASI > EMA 50
Avoid illiquid stocks (daily turnover < SAR 5M)

CRYPTO_BTC.description: Bitcoin / USD — 24/7 perpetual futures or spot

strategy.name: Fibonacci EMA Trend + Supertrend Confirmation
strategy.edge: BTC has well-documented 4-year halving cycles. Daily Fibonacci EMAs (8/21/55/200) have historically high confluence. 200 EMA is the single most watched level in crypto. MACD on daily historically provides 60–65% accurate trend signals. Focus on longs above 200 EMA, avoid shorts in secular bull.

indicators.EMA_200: Macro bull/bear regime — price above = bull only

special: Bull market dip-buy: price pulls to EMA 21 in uptrend + RSI 45–55 = high-probability long
Post-halving 6–18 months: bias long only, no shorts

long: MACD histogram positive or crossing up
Volume confirmation preferred but not required on daily
Optional: wait for 4H candle close above EMA 21 for entry timing
short: Only short in confirmed bear market (price < EMA 200)

exit_rules.take_profit: 4.0 × ATR(14) — BTC moves are larger, use wider TP
exit_rules.partial_exit: Take 50% off at 2×ATR TP, trail rest with EMA 21

risk_rules: Max 3% portfolio risk per trade (higher volatility asset)
No new longs when BTC dominance falling rapidly (altcoin season risk)
Avoid leverage > 3× — BTC 20% moves common
Always use stops — no naked holds through major support breaks

CRYPTO_XRP.description: XRP / USD — Ripple, high-beta crypto with regulatory sensitivity
CRYPTO_XRP.current_regime: Check EMA stack: close ~1.41, need EMA 8/21/50/200 check

strategy.name: EMA Trend Stack + MACD + RSI Swing
strategy.edge: XRP has high beta vs BTC — amplifies BTC moves by 1.5–3×. Daily EMA 8/21 crossovers with MACD confirmation provide clean entries. RSI pullback-to-50 bounces in bull market are extremely reliable. Historical win rate 62–68% on daily swings when all conditions aligned.
strategy.typical_move: 5–15% swings on daily. 20–40% in sustained trends.

indicators.EMA_50: Trend qualifier — price above = bull bias
indicators.EMA_200: Macro regime — long bias only above
indicators.RSI_14: Entry filter: 50–78 for longs, 22–50 for shorts. Avoid > 78 (overextended XRP)
indicators.MACD_12_26_9: Momentum confirmation — histogram direction must match trade

special: XRP/BTC ratio breakout: if XRP/BTC rising while BTC flat = XRP-specific catalyst
News sensitivity: SEC/Ripple regulatory news can cause 10–30% gaps — widen stops

long: Price is above EMA 50 and EMA 200
MACD histogram > 0 or just turned positive
Enter at open of next daily candle OR at close of signal bar
short: Price is below EMA 50 and EMA 200
pullback_long: Price pulls back to touch EMA 21
MACD histogram decelerating but still positive
Enter on next candle bounce confirmation

exit_rules.stop_loss: 1.5 × ATR(14) below entry (tighter due to XRP volatility clustering)
exit_rules.trail_exit: EMA 8 crosses below EMA 21 on daily close
exit_rules.partial_exit: Take 40% off at 1.5×ATR, 40% at 3×ATR, trail 20% with EMA 21

risk_rules: Max 2% portfolio risk per trade
XRP is high-beta — size smaller than BTC trades
Avoid entries ahead of known Ripple court dates or regulatory events
Stop below nearest major support level (not just ATR) if support is closer than ATR stop

screener.description: Daily pre-session scan — runs runBrief() across all watchlist symbols
screener.scan_note: Tadawul: Sun–Thu. US: Mon–Fri. Crypto: daily. Skip closed markets in scan.

bullish: EMA Fast > EMA Mid > EMA Slow (stack aligned)
bearish: EMA Fast < EMA Mid < EMA Slow (stack inverted)
neutral: EMA Fast/Mid/Slow tangled or not fully stacked
No active Long or Short signal from strategy
entry_trigger: EMA Fast crosses above EMA Mid (in bull regime) = long entry
Price bounces off EMA Mid in uptrend with RSI 45–65 = pullback long
Do NOT enter when RSI > 72 (overbought) or < 28 (oversold)

risk_rules: Max 2% portfolio risk per trade across all markets
Max 3 open positions simultaneously
No new longs when RSI > 72; no new shorts when RSI < 28
Drawdown pause: stop trading if portfolio drops 10% in 7 days
Tadawul: no new entries Wednesday/Thursday afternoon (weekend gap risk)
Crypto: no entries 30 min before/after major macro events (FOMC, CPI)
US Equity: earnings blackout 3 days before/after earnings date
Stop loss: ATR-based per market (XRP 1.5×, BTC 2×, US/Tadawul 2×)
Take profit: minimum 2:1 R:R (XRP 3×ATR, BTC 4×ATR, Equity/Tadawul 3×ATR)

global_rules.position_sizing: Risk fixed % of portfolio (see per-market risk rules), never fixed dollar
global_rules.correlation_rule: Do not hold BTC + XRP + ETH simultaneously at full size — they are highly correlated
global_rules.drawdown_pause: Pause trading if portfolio drops 10% in a rolling 7-day window
global_rules.news_blackout: No new entries 30 min before or after major macro events (FOMC, CPI, etc.)

notes: Strategy v2 — Multi-market EMA Trend Stack. US Equity (9/21/50/200 EMA), Tadawul (13/34/89/200 Fibonacci EMA), BTC (8/21/55/200 Fib EMA), XRP (8/21/50/200 EMA). All use MACD + RSI + volume confirmation. ATR-based dynamic SL/TP. Pine script: strategies/multi_market_strategy.pine
